menu.name: Grilled Chicken
menu.description: Juicy grilled chicken grilled to perfection with our special BBQ sauce, served with cilantro and lime.

menu.name: BBQ Ribs Complete Meal
menu.description: Tender BBQ ribs smoked to perfection glazed with our special BBQ sauce, served with baked potatoes, garlic bread, and pit style beans. A delicious meal!

menu.name: Bacon Wrapped Pork Tenderloin
menu.description: Juicy pork tenderloin wrapped smoked in crispy bacon and glazed with our special BBQ sauce.

menu.name: Hamburger & Hotdog Meal
menu.description: A delicious meal of our signature smoked hamburgers and hotdogs served with fries, and mushrooms.

menu.name: Wedding Cake
menu.description: A delicious wedding cake with layers of vanilla and chocolate cake, filled with our special buttercream frosting.

menu.name: Boston Market Sweet Potato Casserole
menu.description: A delicious sweet potato casserole with a buttery, cinnamon-sugar topping, perfect for any holiday meal.

menu.name: Tacos del camarón
menu.description: Delicious shrimp tacos with salsa roja, grilled onions, mexican crema, fire roasted peppers and corn, along with cilantro and lime.

menu.name: Chicken Enchiladas
menu.description: Tender chicken enchiladas filled with seasoned chicken, cheese, and green chilies, served with rice and beans.

menu.name: Tacos al Pastor
menu.description: Perfected pork tacos marinated in a blend of spices and pineapple, white onion, cilantro, and lime. Our owner's favorite taco when he served his mission in Mexico! He knows the flavor, and he perfected it like a real taquero!

menu.name: Lemonade
menu.description: Refreshing hand-squeezed lemonade, our owner has perfected this recipe from his time working for Chick-fil-A.

menu.name: Soda
menu.description: Delicious homemade soda, perfect for any occasion.

menu.name: Horchata
menu.description: Delicious homemade horchata, a traditional Mexican rice drink flavored with cinnamon and vanilla. Nathan has mastered this recipe from his time living in Mexico.

menu.name: Macaroni Salad
menu.description: Creamy and delicious macaroni salad made from the heart. From our kitchen to your table!

menu.name: Potato Salad
menu.description: Creamy and delicious potato salad, this potato salad has many great seasonings to make your taste buds dance.

menu.name: Chef Salad
menu.description: Crisp and refreshing chef salad, a perfect side dish for any meal.

menu.name: Pit Style Baked Beans
menu.description: Delicious pit style baked beans, you don't like beans, this will change your mind!

menu.name: Boston Market Sweet Potato Casserole
menu.description: Delicious Boston Market sweet potato casserole, a perfect side dish for any meal.

menu.name: Texas Twinkie
menu.description: Delicious Texas Twinkie, this is a great side dish that will make a meal of itself. We know you can't have just one bite.

menu.name: Steak and Potatoes
menu.description: Juicy steak served with perfectly smoked-baked potatoes, a hearty entree to make the party right.

menu.name: Tri-TipSteak and Potatoes
menu.description: Juicy tri-tip steak served with perfectly smoked-baked potatoes, a hearty entree that will make your guests talk about it for years.

menu.name: Smoked Bacon Wrapped Chicken Bombs
menu.description: Smoked bacon wrapped chicken bombs, a flavorful and indulgent entree option. These bombs are made with tender chicken breasts stuffed with a savory filling, wrapped in crispy bacon, and smoked to perfection. The result is a deliciously smoky and juicy dish that will satisfy any meat lover's cravings.
